articles.headline: Microsoft raises 2026 capex guidance to $190B amid Copilot surge to 20M paid users
articles.summary: Microsoft guided capital spending to $190B for 2026, well above Wall Street estimates, as Microsoft 365 Copilot reached 20M paid enterprise users with 250% year-over-year growth. Accenture's 740K-seat deal represents the largest single Copilot deployment, signaling accelerating enterprise AI adoption and substantial infrastructure investment requirements.

articles.headline: SanDisk Rides AI Storage Boom with Blowout Quarter and $42B Supply Deals
articles.summary: SanDisk reported $5.95 billion in revenue driven by surging AI storage demand, announcing a $6 billion buyback and $42 billion in long-term supply contracts. This highlights storage as a new strategic bottleneck for AI infrastructure, impacting costs for hyperscalers and enterprises beyond GPUs. Businesses face rising demand for memory and storage, reshaping supply chains and capex planning.

articles.headline: 5 Business Technology Trends Leaders Can't Ignore in 2026: Agentic AI and Robotics-as-a-Service
articles.summary: Agentic AI shifts from pilots to production, enabling SMEs to redesign processes for consistent execution without added headcount. Robotics-as-a-service lowers barriers for physical automation in retail and manufacturing, cutting service costs by over 30% in examples. These trends boost operational efficiency and scalability for small and mid-sized businesses.
